body.docCnt:
##接口调用地址 
 生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/project/getProjectTypeInfList 
 测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/project/getProjectTypeInfList 
 ## 接口描述 
获取企业的全部项目类型 
## 调用方式 
 METHOD: GET  
 CONTENT-TYPE: application/json 
## 接口输入参数 
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"header","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求头根节点","label":"请求头根节点"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"body","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求体根节点","label":"请求体根节点"},"children":[]}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"query","type":"OBJECT","desc":"query根节点","label":"query根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"OPAUID","required":true,"label":"%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8%E6%A0%87%E8%AF%86","exampleValue":"XFA23222"}}]}]</restparamstable> 
## 接口输出参数
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"header","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应头根节点","label":"响应头根节点"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"body","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应体根节点","label":"响应体根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"data","required":false,"label":"%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E6%95%B0%E6%8D%AE","exampleValue":"","desc":""},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"prjTypeSeqId","required":false,"label":"%E9%A1%B9%E7%9B%AE%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B%E8%87%AA%E5%A2%9EID","exampleValue":"253","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"comId","required":false,"label":"%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8ID","exampleValue":"3597","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"prjTypeId","required":false,"label":"%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"PRJTYPE20230901112350","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"prjTypeParentId","required":false,"label":"%E4%B8%8A%E7%BA%A7%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"null","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"prjTypeName","required":false,"label":"%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","exampleValue":"%E9%A1%B9%E7%9B%AE%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"prjTypeLevel","required":false,"label":"%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B%E5%B1%82%E7%BA%A7","exampleValue":"1","desc":""}}]},{"elementData":{"type":"BOOLEAN","name":"success","required":false,"label":"%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E6%98%AF%E5%90%A6%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F","exampleValue":"true","desc":"%20true-%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%2Cfalse-%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"message","required":false,"label":"%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E6%B6%88%E6%81%AF","exampleValue":"%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%EF%BC%81","desc":""}}]}]</restparamstable> 
## 接口调用示例 
 #### 请求报文
{URL}/v1/project/getProjectTypeInfList?OPAUID=XFA23222
#### 响应报文
```json
{
    "data": [
        {
            "prjTypeSeqId": 253,
            "comId": 3597,
            "prjTypeId": "PRJTYPE20230901112350",
            "prjTypeParentId": null,
            "prjTypeName": "项目类型",
            "prjTypeLevel": 1
        },
        {
            "prjTypeSeqId": 273,
            "comId": 3597,
            "prjTypeId": "PRJTYPE20231121095923",
            "prjTypeParentId": "PRJTYPE20230901112350",
            "prjTypeName": "项目类型123",
            "prjTypeLevel": 2
        }
    ],
    "success": true,
    "message": "调用成功！"
}
```  
## 错误码说明 
| 错误码| 错误信息|
  | --- | --- |
  | Data | Data |
